productDisplayName: Forever New Women's Short Black Skirt
description: CompositionBlack short skirt made of 65% polyester, 30% nylon and 5% elastane, with zippered closure on the back, ruffled panel on the sides and lining made of 98% polyester and 2% elastaneFittingRegularWash careDry clean onlyCool iron on reverse if necessaryTake feminine dressing to the next level in this black skirt from forever new.
